sourceMovie.title: Serena
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Serena works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: The Revenant
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Serena clicked for you, The Revenant (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Serena?
faq.answer: Try The Revenant, True Grit, The Village—each shares DNA with Serena while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Serena?
faq.answer: Serena (2014) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Serena worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
